title: Verify apex redirects to www at edge
description: Confirm toppymicros.com redirects permanently to https://www.toppymicros.com/ in Cloudflare or equivalent edge configuration so the www canonical choice is enforced in practice.

title: Centralize YOLOZU version placeholders
Improve site SEO metadata and structured data
description: Normalize education quiz metadata, strengthen hub/proof page SEO tags, and add structured data where it materially improves search understanding.

title: Add difficulty levels and defaults to manifest
description: Define L0-L4 difficulty scale and set defaults: focus on L0-L2 if unspecified; generate 10 questions if unspecified.

title: Define release notes workflow for public site and product launches
description: The repo deploys on push but has no explicit release/change-note workflow for public-facing launches such as new product pages. Define how public updates should be tagged, summarized, or announced so publisher and audit trails are clearer over time.

title: Add RFC 9204 quiz pair
description: Add RFC 9204 (QPACK) quiz pages in English and Japanese, following manifest.json. Focus on HTTP/3 header compression design trade-offs, not rote terminology.

title: Quiz policy compliance audit
description:
# Quiz policy check report

This is a static check against the quiz authoring policy.
It does not execute runtime JS, so it checks what is authored in HTML.

comments.author: thinksyncs
comments.text: Update: policy check now passes in enriched mode (simulating runtime enrichment). The shared template now injects Context / Real-world / Terms / Options / Related and normalizes Japanese punctuation in explanations. Run: python3 scripts/quiz_policy_check.py --mode enriched

title: Add PWA support for education quizzes
description: Add installable PWA support for the education quiz experience, likely scoped to /education first. Use a dedicated web app manifest, service worker caching for quiz pages/assets, and shared registration from the quiz runtime without conflicting with the existing root manifest.json authoring policy file.

title: Add RFC 6585 quiz pair
description: Add RFC 6585 quiz pages in English and Japanese, following manifest.json. Focus on 429 vs 503, Retry-After, 428 lost-update prevention, 431 header bloat, and 511 network authentication, avoiding rote status-code trivia.
close_reason: Added RFC 6585 English/Japanese quiz pair, updated hubs and sitemap, and passed quiz_policy_check.py without warnings.

title: Cleanup: decide scope for JA punctuation rule
description: We currently enforce 'no 。 / 、' in newly generated RFC JA quizzes, but older Japanese quizzes (e.g. finance/K terms) still contain these characters. Decide whether to (a) migrate all legacy JA quizzes to '.' and ',' mechanically, or (b) scope the rule to RFC drill pages only, and document the rule scope.

title: RFC drills: add quizzes + improve explanation rendering
Fix broken report links and 404 indexing
description: Repair broken Thermo-Credit report links/structured data/analytics references, and stop indexing the 404 page by updating sitemap and page metadata.
close_reason: Repointed Thermo-Credit report links to the live public URL, removed 404 from sitemap, marked 404 as noindex, and normalized icon asset paths.

title: Add RFC 7301 quiz pair
description: Add RFC 7301 (ALPN) quiz pages in English and Japanese, following manifest.json. Focus on protocol negotiation, ALPN vs SNI, and operational failure modes rather than rote token memorization.

title: Add graph guidance and RFC quiz diagrams
description: Extend manifest.json with guidance for box-and-arrow diagrams, then add centered-text SVG diagrams to the RFC quiz questions where relationships or flows are easier to understand visually. Keep arrows readable, prevent text overlap, and avoid decorative graphs.
close_reason: Added manifest guidance for diagrams and inserted box-and-arrow SVG diagrams into the most effective RFC quiz questions.

title: Add effective box-arrow diagrams to education quizzes
description: Apply the manifest visual-aid policy to education quiz questions where a box-and-arrow SVG materially improves understanding.

title: RFC drills: add quizzes for RFC 8446 (TLS 1.3)
description: Create EN + JA quiz pages (5-15 questions) for RFC 8446. Keep questions scenario/concept-based (avoid RFC-number trivia). Enforce: no trailing '.' in choices; JA uses '.' and ',' (no '。' '、').

title: Rename CI workflow and avoid full_ci on workflow edits
description: Rename .github/workflows/ci.yml to build_and_test.yml and adjust full_ci path logic so .github/workflows/** changes don't trigger full_ci=true.

title: Add quiz authoring policy
Refactor education quizzes to shared data-driven template
description: Move quiz content out of per-quiz HTML into quiz-specific JSON/JS data files loaded by one shared HTML/runtime template. Keep current shared CSS/JS behavior, preserve bilingual pages, and migrate incrementally to reduce regression risk.

title: Normalize site URLs to www.toppymicros.com
description: Make www.toppymicros.com the canonical host across metadata, structured data, robots, sitemap, and sitemap generation workflow.

title: Align secondary pages with the new homepage tone
description: Update contact, legal, security, and theory/proof pages so they match the clearer information hierarchy and more professional visual tone introduced on the homepage.

title: Remove YOLOZU version display
description: Stop displaying or injecting YOLOZU versions; use versionless PyPI links and remove runtime placeholder logic.

title: Make services intro more concrete
close_reason: Replaced the abstract services intro with a concrete artifacts-first sentence to better match the tightened hero and outcomes language.

title: Improve mobile readability for quiz diagrams
description: Allow horizontal scrolling for box-and-arrow SVG diagrams and preserve minimum readable width on narrow screens so labels and arrows do not overlap.
close_reason: Added horizontal scrolling and minimum diagram width on narrow screens to keep SVG labels and arrows readable without overlap.

title: Improve VSCode PDF Viewer Secure site credibility and audit release workflow
Apply targeted homepage copy tightening
close_reason: Applied targeted homepage copy tightening: simplified the hero, clarified proof labels, reclassified dmarc4all as a managed public service, and softened the contact entry point.

title: Tighten homepage positioning and audience focus
description: Compress homepage sections, sharpen the target audience, and make the value proposition more concise without losing the proof-oriented positioning.

title: Add RFC 9001 quiz pair
description: Add RFC 9001 (Using TLS to Secure QUIC) quiz pages in English and Japanese, following manifest.json. Focus on encryption levels, transport parameters, 0-RTT, and the TLS/QUIC responsibility split rather than packet trivia.
close_reason: Added RFC 9001 English/Japanese quiz pair, updated hubs and sitemap, and passed quiz_policy_check.py without warnings.

title: Refine homepage professionalism and information architecture
description: Rework the homepage so Toppy reads more like a professional company site: clearer positioning, service framing, proof/evidence structure, and more confident CTA hierarchy without losing the existing proof artifacts.
close_reason: Reworked the homepage positioning, information hierarchy, navigation, and CTA structure so Toppy reads more like a professional company site while preserving public proof artifacts.

title: Add RFC 8470 quiz pair
description: Add RFC 8470 quiz pages in English and Japanese, following manifest.json. Focus on HTTP early data, 0-RTT replay risk, when requests are safe to send early, and how application semantics interact with transport speedups, avoiding rote terminology questions.

title: Add quiz answer reveal toggles
description: Add two switches to quiz_template_skeleton to control explanation visibility after answering and showing all answers/score; document behavior in manifest.json.

title: Gate Pages deploy behind site validation checks
description: Pages deploy currently runs independently of link checking and any HTML/content validation. Add a dedicated CI workflow or gating strategy so broken internal links or malformed public pages do not deploy straight to production.

title: Refine quiz light mode UI
description: Update the shared quiz light theme to match the requested clean business-app style: CSS variables up front, white central card, soft gray-blue page background, blue hover/focus states, pill mode switch, rounded buttons, callout boxes, table header styling, and soft difficulty color coding, without depending on an external design system.
close_reason: Updated the shared quiz light theme to match the requested business-app style, including tokens, card/forms/buttons/callouts/tables, and difficulty color coding.

title: RFC drills: add quizzes for RFC 9000 (QUIC)
description: Create EN + JA quiz pages (5-15 questions) for RFC 9000. Focus on QUIC transport concepts (streams, connection IDs, loss recovery at high level, migration, 0-RTT tradeoffs) without requiring memorizing the RFC number. Follow quiz authoring constraints (choices no trailing '.'; JA punctuation '.' and ',' only).

title: Split quiz_template_skeleton into html/css/js
description: Extract inline scripts from education/quiz_template_skeleton.html into education/quiz_template_skeleton.js and add an optional education/quiz_template_skeleton.css; update HTML to reference them.

title: Clarify homepage commercial offer and section hierarchy
close_reason: Homepage now leads with the commercial offer, concrete outputs, lower-friction CTAs, and clearer separation of services, proof, products, and exploratory research.

title: Add RFC 9261 quiz pair
description: Add English and Japanese education quizzes for RFC 9261 Exported Authenticators in TLS, update RFC quiz hubs and sitemap, and keep questions aligned with manifest authoring guidance.

title: Tighten homepage commercial readability follow-ups
close_reason: Tightened the homepage hero, clarified dmarc4all as a managed service, prioritized client-relevant proof, and lowered contact friction for first-time visitors.

title: Document quiz explanation authoring rules
description: Add contentAuthoring requirements to manifest.json: follow theme/URLs, include question terms in explanations, explain all options, and provide related topic examples when relevant.

title: Reorder quiz context after choices
close_reason: Implemented shared quiz context ordering after choices, consolidated intent/premise/keywords into one box, and verified RFC 9261 EN/JA in browser.

title: Reduce third-party asset dependencies on theory pages
description: Self-host or remove Google Fonts and CDN MathJax dependencies on theory and AI Economy proof pages to better match the site's security-first and availability goals.
